description: CSS line-height: unitless number, percentage, absolute length, tight spacing, and table-cell leading.
visual_assertions: The double-spaced paragraph has visibly wider gaps between its lines than the default paragraph.
The 160% paragraph's spacing sits between the default and double-spaced paragraphs.
The 28pt paragraph's baselines are exactly 28pt apart.
The tight paragraph's lines sit closer than default without touching its border.
The roomy table cell is taller than its default-leading sibling.
